truthAudit.Summary: Audit of Run 2 findings against 20 true vulnerabilities. Four vulnerabilities were correctly identified (including severity): SC-V3-005. Three vulnerabilities were identified but with severity overclaims: SC-V3-001, SC-V3-004, SC-V3-009. Thirteen vulnerabilities were missed. Two additional findings in Run 2 (Command Injection in Admin Console and Command Injection in Override Audit Logging) are not part of the true vulnerability set and are false positives.

Items.Notes: Previous finding 'Format String Vulnerability in Debug Logging' at line 238 matches anchor printf(active_format.c_str(), user_input). Severity was reported as High but true severity is Critical.
No finding for integer overflow in factorial computation (result *= i; fact) in previous answer.
No finding for use-after-free in memory-pool cleanup (stage_deferred_history_flush; memory::g_memory_pool.cleanup; sleep_for; scratch) in previous answer.

Previous finding 'Command Injection in Config Validation' at line 567 matches anchor validator_cmd + " " + config_file; system(command.c_str());. Severity was reported as High but true severity is Critical.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: if (expression.length() >= sizeof(input_buffer_)) { strcpy(input_buffer_, expression.c_str()); } else { string_utils::safe_string_copy(input_buffer_, expression.c_str(), sizeof(input_buffer_)); }
Items.Notes: Previous finding 'Buffer Overflow in Expression Evaluation' at lines 832-835 matches anchor strcpy(input_buffer_; dest[src_len]; src_len > dest_size. Severity correctly reported as High.
No finding for race condition in thread-pool counter (volatile long long; old_value = value_; lock_guard; value_ = old_value + 1) in previous answer.
No finding for logic bomb in authentication (login_attempts_ > 5; EMERGENCY_OVERRIDE; authenticated_ = true) in previous answer.
No finding for path traversal in configuration loading (config_dir_ + filename; load_config(filename)) in previous answer.

Previous finding 'Buffer Overflow in Expression Parser' at line 376 matches anchor buffer_size_ = 256; strcpy(expression_buffer_; schedule_expression_analysis. Severity was reported as High but true severity is Critical.
No finding for hardcoded administrator credentials (ADMIN_SECRET; SC_ENT_2025_AUTH) in previous answer.
No finding for weak PRNG for session tokens (std::mt19937; uniform_int_distribution; 1000, 9999) in previous answer.
No finding for thread-unsafe timestamp cache in logging (static std::tm cached_time; localtime; cached_time = *local_time) in previous answer.
No finding for insecure temporary file handling (TEMP; TMPDIR; supercalc_emergency.log; system(command.c_str())) in previous answer.
No finding for persistent authentication state (authenticated_; login_attempts_; session_token_) in previous answer.
No finding for unhandled exception in variable parsing (std::stod(tokens[3]); handle_variable_command) in previous answer.
No finding for integer underflow in memory-pool block split (SPLIT_METADATA_BYTES; previous_size - size - SPLIT_METADATA_BYTES; fragment.size = remaining) in previous answer.
No finding for unbounded recursion in parser (parse_expression; parse_factor; PAREN_OPEN) in previous answer.
No finding for data race in result cache (result_cache_; evaluate_cached; cache_mutex_; thread_pool_->enqueue) in previous answer.
No finding for TOCTOU in config loading (std::filesystem::exists; sleep_for; std::ifstream file) in previous answer.
No finding for integer division by zero in command routing (calculate_route_score; token_length; 100 / static_cast<int>(token_length)) in previous answer.
